name: Alder
notes: Soft hardwood; takes paint well; most common in PNW residential

name: Maple (Hard)
notes: Dense and smooth; excellent for painted doors

name: Maple (Soft)
notes: Lighter than hard maple; good painted option

name: Red Oak
notes: Open grain; popular for traditional stain work

name: White Oak
notes: Tighter grain than red; Rift/Q for contemporary

name: Cherry
notes: Darkens with light exposure; rich tone

name: Ash
notes: Similar to white oak; open grain

name: MDF
notes: No grain; ultra-smooth painted finish; no moisture exposure
